{"problem_standardized_math":"Consider the bound-constrained quadratic problem (16.68) with\n\\[\nG=\\begin{bmatrix}4 & 1\\\\ 1 & 2\\end{bmatrix},\\qquad\nc=\\begin{bmatrix}-1\\\\ 1\\end{bmatrix},\\qquad\nl=\\begin{bmatrix}0\\\\ 0\\end{bmatrix},\\qquad\n\\nu=\\begin{bmatrix}5\\\\ 3\\end{bmatrix}.\n\\]\nSuppose that \\(x^0=(0,2)^T\\). Find \\(\\bar t_1, \\bar t_2, t_1, t_2, p^1, p^2\\), and \\(x(t_1), x(t_2)\\). Then find the minimizer of \\(q(x(t))\\)."}
